name: Ask Eric
desc: Swamphacks 2023 Project! A chatbot that uses natural language processing (NLP) to provide accurate and truthful answers to your healthcare and health-related questions.
summary: Ask-Eric was a team project for SwampHacks 2023. This app allows users to chat with a LLM that has been fine-tuned on a set of health-related questions. It has a Django backend, a React frontend, and it uses OpenAI's API to train a text-davinci-003 model on human-gathered health and health insurance-related data.
lessons: I learned a lot from this project, most of it is on my LinkedIn post :)
